tasks.subject: Add courses schema to database
tasks.description: Add new tables: courses, courseModules, courseEnrollments, moduleProgress. Then update db:push.

tasks.subject: Build admin courses CRUD pages
tasks.description: Create admin routes: /admin/courses (list), /admin/courses/create (create), /admin/courses/$id (edit course + manage modules). Include course modules sub-section inside edit page.

tasks.subject: Build public courses pages
tasks.description: Create /courses (list), /courses/$id (course detail + module list), /courses/$id/modules/$moduleId (module viewer with theory/practice tabs).

tasks.subject: Build course enrollment and progress tracking
tasks.description: Add enrollment button on course detail, track progress in moduleProgress table, show enrolled courses on dashboard.

tasks.subject: Add course API routes and services
tasks.description: Create server functions for courses CRUD, modules CRUD, enrollment, progress.
tasks.activeForm: Adding course API routes and services
